title: townsendia dejecta
intro: Townsendia dejecta, also known as the western Townsend daisy, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to the northwestern United States. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used to promote health by reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, as well as to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Townsendia dejecta include infusions, salves, and tinctures, which are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
